query: What is the most recent NIFC National Fire News year-to-date acres burned figure for 2026, latest available as of late June 2026? Report the exact YTD acres and date.
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary:

## Answer

**The most recent NIFC National Fire News year-to-date acres burned figure available as of late June 2026 was 3,138,394 acres**, reported in the **Incident Management Situation Report (IMSR) dated Tuesday, June 30, 2026 (0730 MDT)** — the final report of the month. That same report listed **35,884 YTD wildfires**.

### Key details
- **June 30, 2026 IMSR:** 3,138,394 YTD acres / 35,884 fires (this is the definitive "latest as of late June")
- **June 29, 2026 IMSR:** 3,071,850 YTD acres / 35,682 fires (matches the "June 29, 2026" date cited on NIFC's National Fire News page)
- At month-end, 2026 acreage was **~159% of the 2016–2025 ten-year average**, driven mainly by the Rocky Mountain Area (1.30M acres) and Southern Area (1.04M acres).

### Important caveat on data vintage
The **live NIFC Statistics page today (July 12, 2026)** shows a *newer, higher* current figure of **3,453,727 acres / 38,747 wildfires** ("Last Updated July 11, 2026"), reflecting the July 10 IMSR. That is the current value — **not** the late-June figure. Since your question specifies "latest available as of late June 2026," the correct figure is the **June 30, 2026 value of 3,138,394 acres** (or 3,071,850 acres if a strict June 29 cutoff is intended).

All figures come directly from the primary source (NIFC daily IMSRs) and are preliminary, subject to minor retroactive revision.

key_facts: The latest NIFC year-to-date acres-burned figure available as of late June 2026 is 3,138,394 acres, from the June 30, 2026 IMSR (0730 MDT) — the last report of the month.
The June 30, 2026 IMSR also reported 35,884 year-to-date wildfires nationally.
The June 29, 2026 IMSR (the specific 'June 29' date cited on NIFC's National Fire News page) reported 3,071,850 YTD acres and 35,682 YTD fires.
As of June 30, 2026, national YTD acres burned were about 159% of the 2016–2025 ten-year average (~1,977,688 acres), a well-above-normal season.
The Rocky Mountain Area (1,297,880 acres) and Southern Area (1,041,805 acres) accounted for the majority of the 2026 YTD acreage.

By the current access date (July 12, 2026), NIFC's live Statistics page shows an updated figure of 3,453,727 YTD acres / 38,747 wildfires, last updated July 11, 2026 — this is the current, not late-June, value.
The July 10, 2026 IMSR YTD table lists 3,445,499 acres and 38,541 fires; the website carries slightly higher same-day updated numbers.
NIFC YTD statistics are preliminary and subject to minor retroactive revision as agencies complete adjustments in the SIT/209 application.
